title: senecio meridanus
intro: Senecio meridanus, also known as the Green Flame or Irish Flame, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family (Asteraceae) characterized by its vibrant green and yellow flowers. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, due to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and other bioactive compounds. Senecio meridanus has been associated with several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, relieving respiratory issues, and exhibiting antimicrobial properties. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can be found in some traditional medicine systems, particularly in Europe and Asia.
